channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Marcos vows prompt and impartial government aid for all citizens
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. has guaranteed that government assistance, especially for senior citizens, will be delivered quickly and without political bias. Speaking in his vlog, the President enco...

item.title: Actor and Acting Coach Corey Parker Passes Away at Age 60 After Cancer Battle
item.description: Corey Parker, well-known for his work on television series including the popular show ‘Will & Grace’, has passed away at the age of 60 following a prolonged battle with cancer. He died on Thursday in ...

item.title: Israel-Lebanon Conflict Escalates as Airstrikes Hit Beirut and Eastern Bekaa Valley
item.description: On Saturday, the conflict between Israel and Lebanon sharply escalated, with Israeli forces conducting heavy airstrikes on Beirut and launching a rare helicopter operation in the eastern Bekaa Valley....

item.title: Renewed search for Flight MH370 in Indian Ocean finds no wreckage after 12 years
item.description: Twelve years after Malaysia Airlines Flight MH370 vanished, a renewed search in the southern Indian Ocean has so far failed to locate the aircraft. The Boeing 777 disappeared on 8 March 2014 with 239 ...

item.title: Violence Disrupts Wike Faction PDP Local Government Congresses in Oyo
item.description: On Saturday, the local government congresses of the Nyesom Wike faction of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) for Oyo State were disrupted by hoodlums, causing widespread destruction and injuries. Par...

item.title: Josh Morrissey Becomes Jets’ Top-Scoring Defenseman with Overtime Goal Against Canucks
item.description: Josh Morrissey netted the game-winning goal 1:49 into overtime, securing a 3-2 victory for the Winnipeg Jets over the Vancouver Canucks. This milestone made Morrissey the highest-scoring defenseman in...

item.title: Police detain Aurat March organisers and volunteers in Islamabad under Section 144 before Women’s Day rally
item.description: On March 8, 2026, several women’s rights activists associated with Aurat March were detained by Islamabad police just before their planned rally to mark International Women’s Day. The detentions took ...

item.title: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney Supports Removing Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor from Royal Line of Succession
item.description: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney has expressed support for removing Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, formerly known as Prince Andrew, from the British royal line of succession. Speaking to reporters in ...

item.title: Three UN Peacekeepers Wounded in Southern Lebanon Amid Israel-Hezbollah Escalation
item.description: Three United Nations peacekeepers were injured in southern Lebanon after their base was hit on Friday, according to UNIFIL and the Ghanaian military, which operates a battalion at the site. The attack...

item.title: UN report shows women still lack full legal rights globally
item.description: According to recent UN report wey dem release for International Women's Day 2026, women and girls worldwide still no dey enjoy equal legal rights with men. The report, titled 'Ensuring and Strengtheni...

item.title: MPs Approve Sh2 Billion Fund to Strengthen Public Prosecutions in Kenya
item.description: The Office of the Director of Public Prosecutions (ODPP) has received a major boost after the National Assembly’s Committee on Delegated Legislation approved regulations to unlock Sh2 billion for a de...

item.title: Super Eagles Coach Explains Breakdown of $130,000 Monthly Salary for Staff and Self
item.description: Na the Histores de Foot podcast wey Super Eagles head coach Eric Chelle talk, e come defend the $130,000 monthly salary wey e request. Chelle yan say the money no be only for him pocket; e go also cov...

item.title: Key Developments in Philippine Politics, Security, and International Affairs This Week
item.description: From March 1 to 7, 2026, several key developments unfolded in Philippine politics and national security. Congressman Bong Suntay sparked controversy over a remark about actress Anne Curtis, prompting ...

item.title: 'Sisa,' starring Hilda Koronel, awarded Best Screenplay at Portugal's Fantasporto Film Festival
item.description: The Philippine film 'Sisa,' starring veteran actress Hilda Koronel, has recently earned international recognition by winning the Best Screenplay award at the prestigious Fantasporto Film Festival in P...

item.title: Investigation Underway After Man Throws Suspicious Devices Near Anti-Muslim Protest in New York
item.description: New York police and the FBI’s Joint Terrorism Task Force are investigating an incident where an 18-year-old man, Amir Balat, threw ignited devices near far-right protesters outside Mayor Zohran Mamdan...

item.title: Rising Food Costs Make Nutritious Meals Hard to Afford for Low-Income Families
item.description: According to the February 2026 Household Affordability Index, the cost of nutritious food in South Africa continues to rise, making healthy meals increasingly unattainable for low-income households. F...

item.title: Iran President Pezeshkian Announces Halt to Attacks on Neighbouring Countries Unless Attacked First
item.description: Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian has made a big statement saying that his country will stop attacking neighbouring nations. This comes after Iran launched missiles and drones in recent days during t...

item.title: Nicole Borromeo Shares Her Thoughts on Joining Miss Universe Philippines 2026
item.description: Cebu Province's beauty queen, Nicole Borromeo, has expressed that this year is the right moment for her to join Miss Universe Philippines 2026. In an exclusive interview with ABS-CBN, Borromeo shared ...

item.title: Pioneering Women Officers Who Broke Barriers in Indian Army
item.description: On the eve of International Women's Day, The Times of India highlighted the remarkable journeys of Lt Col Ravinder Jit Randhawa (retd) and Major Priya Jhingan (retd), two women who reshaped the Indian...

item.title: Water Sector Anti-Corruption Forum Established to Protect National Water Resources
item.description: The Special Investigating Unit (SIU) and the Department of Water and Sanitation (DWS) have launched the Water Sector Anti-Corruption Forum (WSACF) to strengthen efforts against corruption and safeguar...
